problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
